title: Nightly Cleanup Batch Job
description: Build a scheduled cleanup job. Every day at 2am, delete all Logs where created_at is older than 30 days. Also expose GET /api/logs so the test can verify rows exist before and after. No pages, no auth — just a scheduled batch job that prunes old data.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Logs table:
  message, required
  level, default 'info'
  created_at_date, auto

# Your scheduled job + /api/logs endpoint here
# Use: every day at '02:00 AM': ... delete old Logs ...
